This is the standalone export payload written to /Volumes/caseops/gold/exports/regulatory_review/<document_id>.json for an export-ready FDA warning letter Gold record. Shape reflects B-0 contract §4 (docs/bedrock-handoff-contract.md). UUIDs are static placeholders. classification_confidence is populated (target-state path). See also expected_gold_fda_warning_letter.json for the full Gold record containing this payload.

violation_type: Failure to Establish Adequate Laboratory Controls (21 CFR § 211.160(b))
Inadequate Investigation of Out-of-Specification (OOS) Results (21 CFR § 211.192)
Failure to Maintain Adequate Equipment Qualification Records (21 CFR § 211.68)
extracted_fields.summary: The FDA inspected Meridian Pharmaceutical Solutions, Inc. and found significant violations of CGMP regulations related to laboratory controls, OOS investigations, and equipment qualification records.

parsed_text_excerpt:
FDA Warning Letter — Meridian Pharmaceutical Solutions, Inc.

Date: March 14, 2025

Issued to:
Marcus J. Holloway
Chief Executive Officer
Meridian Pharmaceutical Solutions, Inc.
4800 Industrial Parkway, Suite 200
Springfield, IL 62704

District Office: Central Region — Chicago District

Dear Mr. Holloway,

The United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) inspected your drug manufacturing facility...
